final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a steampunk mechanical apparatus with intricate gears, pipes and gauges.

Style/medium: steampunk illustration, Victorian industrial aesthetic, mechanical blueprint meets artistic rendering
Composition: detailed close-up of the apparatus core, angled perspective showing depth of layered components, balanced arrangement of mechanical elements
Subject: complex mechanical apparatus with interlocking brass gears, copper pipes, pressure gauges with ornate dials, steam valves, riveted metal plates
Scene/backdrop: neutral or subtly textured background to emphasize the machinery, hint of workshop environment
Lighting/mood: warm ambient light reflecting off brass and copper surfaces, subtle rim lighting to highlight metallic edges, nostalgic and precise atmosphere
Color palette: warm brass and copper tones as dominant, oxidized green patina accents, dark iron shadows, cream or sepia undertones
Materials/textures: polished brass with subtle tarnish, smooth copper tubing, cast iron with machined surfaces, engraved Victorian decorative patterns, visible rivets and seams
Avoid: modern plastic materials, clean futuristic aesthetics, overly pristine surfaces, 8K stuffer words, photorealistic rendering style
